audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition; draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for messages to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira; symbolic assembly exhortation with anti-targeting safeguards.

verses.restored: To the messenger of the assembly in Ephesus write: These things says the One holding the seven stars in his right hand, walking among the seven golden lampstands.
I know your works, toil, endurance, and that you cannot bear harmful ones; you tested those calling themselves apostles and found them false.
You have endurance and bore because of my name and have not grown weary.
But I have this against you: you left your first love.
Remember from where you have fallen, turn/realign, and do the first works; otherwise I come and move your lampstand from its place, unless you turn.
But this you have: you hate the works of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.
The one having ear, hear what Spirit says to the assemblies. To the one conquering I will give to eat from tree of life in the paradise of the Divine.
To the messenger of the assembly in Smyrna write: These things says the First and Last, who became dead and lived.
I know your pressure and poverty, yet you are rich, and the slander from those saying they are Judeans and are not, but are assembly of the adversarial one.

Do not fear what you are about to suffer. Look, the accuser is about to cast some of you into prison so that you may be tested, and you will have pressure ten days. Become trustworthy until death, and I will give you crown of life.
The one having ear, hear what Spirit says to the assemblies. The one conquering will not be harmed by the second death.
To the messenger of the assembly in Pergamum write: These things says the One having the sharp two-edged sword.

I know where you dwell, where the throne of the adversarial one is; and you hold fast my name and did not deny my trust even in days of Antipas, my trustworthy witness, who was killed among you where the adversarial one dwells.
But I have a few things against you: you have some holding teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to put stumbling before sons of Israel, to eat idol-offerings and practice sexual misuse.
So also you have some holding teaching of Nicolaitans likewise.
Therefore turn/realign; otherwise I come to you quickly and will contend with them by the sword of my mouth.

The one having ear, hear what Spirit says to assemblies. To the one conquering I will give hidden manna, and a white stone, and upon the stone a new name written that no one knows except the one receiving.
To the messenger of the assembly in Thyatira write: These things says the Son of the Divine, having eyes like flame of fire and feet like burnished bronze.
I know your works, love, trust, service, endurance, and that your latter works are greater than the first.
But I have against you that you tolerate the woman Jezebel, the one calling herself prophet and teaching and misleading my servants into sexual misuse and eating idol-offerings.
I gave her time to turn, and she does not will to turn from her misuse.
Look, I cast her upon a bed, and those committing adultery with her into great pressure, unless they turn from her works.
And her children I will strike with death, and all assemblies will know that I am the One searching kidneys and hearts, and I will give to each according to your works.
But to the rest in Thyatira, as many as do not hold this teaching, who did not know the so-called deep things of the adversarial one, I say: I do not cast upon you another weight.
Only hold fast what you have until I come.
To the one conquering and keeping my works until completion, I will give authority over the nations,
and one will shepherd them with iron rod, as vessels of pottery are shattered, as I also received from my Father.
And I will give that one the morning star.
The one having ear, hear what Spirit says to the assemblies.

translation_notes: Assembly messages are symbolic pastoral diagnoses, not permission to target modern groups.
'Judeans and are not' language in Smyrna is local conflict rhetoric and must never become anti-Jewish contempt.
Sword from mouth is word/judgment imagery.
safety_note: Revelation 2 uses severe symbolic warning. Do not literalize violence or weaponize labels such as Jezebel, Balaam, or adversarial assembly against people.
